PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS SHOWING HOW EACH DEFENDANT WAS NEGLIGENT. THE DEMURRER AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND.
